review_text: Great product! Very easy to use and intuitive interface.
The app crashes frequently when I try to upload files.
Customer service was responsive and helpful.
Notifications are overwhelming and hard to manage.
Mobile interface is confusing and not user-friendly.
Love the integrations with other tools we use.
Sometimes slow to load, especially with large data.
Good overall, but the pricing is a bit high.
Fantastic experience, would highly recommend to others.
